pages.label: Chat
pages.description: The main chat surface (default/new conversation) where you type a message to your assistant.

pages.label: Channels
pages.description: Connect messaging channels (e.g. Slack, Telegram) and invite people to reach the assistant.

pages.label: Connect
pages.description: Confirmation page for accepting an assistant-to-assistant invite link, creating a trusted connection (requires ?senderAssistantId= and ?token=).

pages.label: Contacts
pages.description: Contacts and their connected channels (Slack, Telegram, email), plus invite links to connect people.

pages.label: Conversation
pages.description: A single conversation's chat transcript and composer; supports ?message= to scroll to and highlight a message.

pages.label: Document
pages.description: Full-page viewer for a single document, with a comments panel, PDF rendering and an edit-in-chat path.

pages.label: Activity
pages.description: The Activity page opened on the Notifications tab — a feed of recaps and notifications from your assistant; the Schedules tab lives alongside it (path-based, not ?tab=).

pages.label: Identity
pages.description: View and edit the assistant's name, avatar, personality and traits.

pages.label: Context Inspector
pages.description: The LLM context inspector for one conversation, showing the exact context sent to the model with a per-message scope selector and ZIP export.

pages.label: App
pages.description: Detail view for a single library app, with an Open action.

pages.label: Library
pages.description: The library of the assistant's apps and documents with search, an Import action, and Pinned and Recents sections.

pages.label: Emails
pages.description: Log of emails your assistant sent, with totals and a list of recent emails (platform-hosted only).

pages.label: Logs
pages.description: Entry point to Logs & Usage; the index renders the Usage view, with sibling tabs for Emails and System Events.

pages.label: System Events
pages.description: Feed of system events for a platform-hosted assistant (lifecycle and activity audit trail).

pages.label: Usage
pages.description: Inference usage and cost analytics with totals and a breakdown chart, groupable by schedule and filterable by time range (?range=, ?groupBy=).

pages.label: Plugins
pages.description: Catalog to browse and install plugins that extend the assistant (?plugin= deep-links a plugin's detail).

pages.label: Schedule
pages.description: The Schedules tab with a specific schedule's drawer focused, for viewing or editing that scheduled task.

pages.label: Schedules
pages.description: The Activity page opened on the Schedules tab, listing the assistant's scheduled and recurring tasks.

pages.label: Advanced
pages.description: Advanced settings for the automatic-update window and the assistant memory toggle (remembering information from past conversations).

pages.label: Models & Services
pages.description: Configure the language model and connected services — web search, web fetch, email, image generation, text-to-speech and speech-to-text (including provider API keys).

pages.label: Archive
pages.description: List of archived conversations with the ability to unarchive them.

pages.label: Billing
pages.description: Billing and subscription management — plan, upgrade, payment methods, usage, and referrals.

pages.label: Bookmarks
pages.description: Saved message bookmarks, with an Open link back to the message and a remove action.

pages.label: Community
pages.description: Community links — Vellum is open source; join the community hub and follow on X and YouTube.

pages.label: Debug
pages.description: Debug tools across tabs: General (default) with Backups (view/create/restore), Restart Assistant and Recovery Mode; plus Terminal (?tab=terminal) and Doctor (?tab=doctor).

pages.label: Self-Hosted Assistants
pages.description: Manage self-hosted assistants — the machines/devices running the assistant yourself.

pages.label: General
pages.description: General settings for theme (dark mode), timezone, compute & resources, software updates, sleep policy and retiring the assistant.

pages.label: Integrations
pages.description: Manage integrations across two tabs: OAuth app connections (default, with filters and search) and MCP servers (?tab=mcp).

pages.label: Keyboard Shortcuts
pages.description: Reference list of keyboard shortcuts for the app.

pages.label: Notifications
pages.description: Notification preferences, including pausing alerts and snoozing with an optional reason.

pages.label: Permissions & Privacy
pages.description: Privacy and permission controls including system permissions, trust rules, risk tolerance, biometrics, and Share Analytics / Share Diagnostics toggles.

pages.label: Settings
pages.description: Settings overview; the index renders the General panel directly inside the sidebar-based settings shell.

pages.label: Security
pages.description: Account security settings, primarily two-factor authentication (2FA).

pages.label: Sounds
pages.description: Sound settings to enable sound effects and adjust their volume.

pages.label: Voice
pages.description: Voice settings for microphone selection, push-to-talk, and conversation timeout for voice mode.

pages.label: Skills
pages.description: Catalog to add, install and remove skills for the assistant (?skill= opens a specific skill).

pages.label: Workspace
pages.description: File browser for the assistant's workspace files and folders.
